events.confirmProd: Switch to production: All test orders on the Pi, cloud statistics, and stock changes from test mode will be deleted or reset. Continue?

statusConfirm.title: Change status
statusConfirm.toTest: Switch to test mode: The event will be visible on Pis and can accept test orders. Continue?
statusConfirm.toArchive: Switch to archived: The event will be completed and no longer active. Continue?

stats.title: Statistics
stats.selectArticlesHint: Select one or more articles to see order frequency over time.
stats.selectCategoriesHint: Select one or more article groups to see order frequency over time.
stats.noData: No data in the selected timeframe.

articles.preselectedHint: Preselected additions are checked by default when ordering on Pi (can be deselected).
